statement: In every magma, Equation 3640 (`x * y = z * ((w * y) * z)`) implies Equation 3323 (`x * y = x * (y * (z * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0177
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op w y) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op x (op y (op z z)))
